summary: ComStar took control of Terra and sealed it

mechanics.name_guess: ComStar took control of Terra and sealed it
mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 169 > locations > ComStar took control of Terra and sealed it
mechanics.excerpt: ComStar took control of Terra and sealed it off from other worlds. In 3057_ Terra fell radical splinter group of ComStar known as the Word of Blake_ With the widest mix of cultures, languages.
